title: 有馬記念の後に・Das Versprechen

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Pant... Huff!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I won!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...My edge has dulled. I must re-hone myself.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Does this mean you'll be participating in races
seriously next year?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm planning to do the same. I'll be happy to do so
just to get another chance to race with you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Spare me the flattery. There are plenty of racers
who can entertain you besides me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You mean the juniors? You're not wrong. There is
beauty in these up-and-comers.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash—you're good, but you won't escape
me next time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
No matter my opponent, what I must do remains
unchanged.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will continue to get consistent results, even
during my senior year. And then...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I will become someone I can be proud of...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I'm fine. I admit that was a fierce battle.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But at the moment, I would prefer words of praise
rather than concern.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. The strength of my competitors far
exceeded my expectations... but I still managed
to do well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After such a ferocious battle, I am ever more
confident that I am on the correct path...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Per my original plan, I wish to run G1 races during
my senior year as well.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Which means my first hurdle will be the Senior
Spring Triple Crown's opening race, the Osaka
Hai.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer... It just occurred to me, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Alles in Ordnung—it means "all is well."

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I had anticipated for the senior racers to be
strong, but even so, I have been able to progress
along my path.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
What's more, I even achieved victory. The races
next year should not be as much of a struggle as
today's so long as I continue to improve.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I wonder... Is it too soon to believe I can
complete the rest of my schedule?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzzt...
choice_data_list: Go ahead and take that call.
Go ahead and take that call.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Ja, hallo.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash starts talking to who I assume are her
parents when suddenly...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Wirklich?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
My mother and father are planning to come to
Japan to watch me race!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: It is! I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But this is truly a shock. My parents are both
extremely busy and systematic people.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Even their visit to see my tryouts was made only
after I decided to study abroad.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I believe they must have made this
decision long ago...
choice_data_list: They must really want to see you race.
They must really want to see you race.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Indeed. My parents said so themselves.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They've apparently made time to come during the
latter half of October next year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I run through Eishin Flash's schedule in my head
and line up the dates.
choice_data_list: They'll be here for the autumn Tenno Sho, then!
They'll be here for the autumn Tenno Sho, then!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I'll have to train accordingly to be in peak
condition for then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I must keep my promise...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I just promised to show my parents how much I
have grown.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I said I will run the perfect race before them and
that I'll win every race along the way until that
point.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I told them that I will not know defeat in my
senior year.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Perhaps I promised them too much...
choice_data_list:
Winning everything has been my plan from the
beginning.

Winning everything has been my plan from the
beginning.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I will send my parents the race details.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A thought occurs to me as I see Eishin Flash off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Quite a few Umamusume who made a name for
themselves in their generation have become
active in races again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The question is, why? I don't have an answer, but
I can't help but feel unsettled as things lead up to
the Osaka Hai...
